name: BLUSKY AI INC.
summary: BluSky AI Inc. (formerly Inception Mining Inc.) is a pre-fabricated modular data center provider specializing in artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing (HPC). The company offers rapidly deployable SkyMod AI Factory systems and a GPU-as-a-Service model providing flexible access to top-tier GPUs. Headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah, BluSky AI targets energy-rich sites across the western and central United States, with a planned potential power capacity exceeding 250 MW across its portfolio of development-stage sites.

products.name: SkyMod
products.description: Pre-fabricated, modular, plug-and-play AI Factory data center units available in various configurations, optimized for AI/ML and HPC workloads.

products.name: GPU-as-a-Service
products.description: Consumption-based model providing flexible, transparent hourly access to top-tier GPUs for enterprises, research institutions, and startups.

products.name: Neocloud Infrastructure
products.description: AI-first bare-metal GPU access platform supporting hybrid and multi-cloud environments with simplified pricing and orchestration tools.
